title: selaginella lonko-batu
intro: Selaginella lonko-batu, a type of rare and endangered species of the genus Selaginella, is a perennial plant that belongs to the family Selaginellaceae, commonly known as spikemoss. It has been found to possess medicinal properties due to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic compounds, which are known to exhibit antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial activities. The plant is believed to offer several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and exhibiting potential anti-cancer properties. Selaginella lonko-batu can be used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often consumed to harness its medicinal and health-promoting properties.
